name: Cranberry Opera Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the sides of a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
2. Combine sugar, milk, cream, corn syrup, and salt in the saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils.
4. Continue cooking to reach the soft ball stage (238°F).
5. Remove from heat and let cool to lukewarm (110°F) without stirring.
6. Add butter and vanilla extract, then beat vigorously until the mixture becomes very thick and starts to lose its gloss.
7. Quickly stir in the chopped cranberries.
8. Spread the mixture into a buttered 9x5x3-inch pan.
9. Score the fudge into squares while it is still warm.
10. Cut the fudge when it has cooled and become firm. Makes approximately 2 1/2 dozen pieces.
